about.title: My Journey
about.subtitle: A little about me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full-Stack developer with a strong focus on Python, my main language. I'm in my 8th semester of Computer Systems Engineering at Tecnológico Nacional de México, Campus Celaya, and I've led technical teams under Scrum, including 1st place at LinceHack 2026, Innovation & Technology category.
about.paragraph2: My work goes beyond websites: I've built full web platforms and mobile apps with Flutter, with particular depth in REST APIs with FastAPI and Flask, security architectures (RBAC, RLS, authentication), and data processing engines. From management systems for businesses to smart waste-collection apps with real-time notifications, I always prioritize privacy, security, and user experience.
about.toastMessage: This animation was programmed by me.
